summary: Admin customers filter-empty state displays correctly on mobile narrow viewport. The screen shows proper heading, search controls, status filter, and the required filter-empty message. Dark theme implementation is consistent with admin interface expectations. All required controls remain accessible at 390px width.

violations.description: Search input shows placeholder 'atch-zz*' which appears to be test data rather than a user-friendly placeholder like 'Search customers...'

actions: Consider updating search placeholder text to be more user-friendly in production builds
